rationale: The citing paper explicitly states that simple effects in its studies were conducted using the spotlight technique from Spiller et al. (2013). Across the results sections, the authors repeatedly report spotlight analyses to interpret interaction patterns, indicating a direct methodological use. This is more than a passing background mention because it supports how key inferential tests are carried out, even though the citing paper does not extend or challenge the cited method.
relation_description: Ward and Broniarczyk apply Spiller et al. (2013) as the statistical procedure for probing interactions with spotlight/simple-effects tests. The cited work is used to implement and justify their interaction follow-up analyses across studies.
